Subject: Internal Deal Memo - Project Starfish

Date: 12 October 2023

To: Executive Committee

From: Mr. Jonathan Lim, Head of Acquisitions

We are pleased to present an update on Project Starfish, our upcoming strategic acquisition of Coral Tech Solutions Pte Ltd (UEN: 200312345H). The acquisition aims to enhance our technological capabilities in the AI sector. The proposed transaction value is SGD 48,500,000.

Dr. Lisa Tan, our Chief Technology Officer, has conducted a thorough due diligence process. The primary contact for Coral Tech Solutions is Mr. Samuel Ng, reachable at +65 6123 4567, email: samuel.ng@coraltech.sg.

For internal reference, please note that Dr. Lisa Tan's NRIC is S8765432H. Further details will be shared in the following weeks as we progress towards finalization.

Please direct any queries to my office at jonathan.lim@fictitiouscorp.sg.
